creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
- vapoursynth fixed with unrelated updates to that port.
 - musescore fixed in r530691.
 - kms-cmake-utils needs to exactly match the CMake version, so commit together with the cmake update.
 - torrent-file-editor has a trivial fix which i'll PR separately
 - elmerfem fixed upstream, committed in r530701
